name: Bud Green
abstract: Bud Green (19 November 1897 – 2 January 1981) was an American lyricist especially of Broadway musicals and show tunes

about_quotes.speaker: Isaiah "Ike" Robinson
about_quotes.evidence: With a shield table, trombone, a fellow by the name of Bud Green. He was on drums... Little Willie, well, he was playing clarinet in our band at them times. And I was guitar.

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy McRae
about_quotes.evidence: Bud Green did the lyrics, I did the melody, and Ella was just -- they were just cutting on the song.
